creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 172681
elantech.diff (11-CURRENT)

Changes:
1. (Hopefully) fixes cursor jump after releasing of one finger in "2finger scroll" on Hw v.3 touchpads
2. fixes staying in "2finger scroll" state after releasing of one finger on Hw v.4 touchpads
3. (Hopefully) fixes incorrect noise area sizing for Synaptics touchpads
